I

initialize() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
Called automatically by FXMLLoader once every @FXML field above is injected.
INNER_RADIUS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
 
INTACT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.SegmentState
The segment has not been hit by any shot.
intactHullMaterial(Color) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
 
invalidPreviewMaterial() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
Flat red "this doesn't fit here" look for an invalid placement preview.
InvalidShipPlacementException - Exception in com.example.battleship.model.exception
Thrown when a ship cannot be placed where requested -- either it would overlap another ship already on the board, or part of it would fall outside the board's bounds.
InvalidShipPlacementException(String) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exception.InvalidShipPlacementException
 
InvalidShipPlacementException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exception.InvalidShipPlacementException
 
isComplete() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
isFullyHit() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
isHit(Board, Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
 
ISLAND_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
isOver() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
 
isShot() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Cell
 
isSunk() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
 
isSunk() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
isValidSegment(int) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
